suite.name: CadastroCNPJ

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.arg: Configura parametros para testes de CNPJ
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Conecta ao banco de dados
kw.doc: Keyword utilizada para realizar a conexão com o banco de dados.

kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.
kw.msg: Connect to DB using : psycopg2.connect(database='ws', user='wssim', password=***, host='10.171.217.166', port=9000)

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: \n⚙️ Injetando Massa de Dados no Postgres...
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.arg: UPDATE wsconfigentidade SET idnpermitevisualizar = 1, idnpermiteeditar = 1, idnpermitecadastrar = 1;

UPDATE wsconfigentidadecampo SET idnobrigatorio = 1 WHERE labelcampo IN ('tipocliente', 'descricao', 'cidade', 'nome', 'parceiro', 'idnativo', 'profissional', 'sgltipopessoa', 'telefone', 'email', 'razaosocial', 'idnpessoafisica', 'cpf', 'login', 'perfilacesso', 'idnpadrao', 'datainicio', 'logradouro', 'nomeparceiro', 'numero', 'cnpj', 'nomeparceirofantasia');

INSERT INTO classificacaoparceiro (idclassificacaoparceiro, idnativo, percentualdesconto, descricao, sglclassificacao, ordem, codigoerp, wsversao) SELECT 99999, 1, 0, 'CLASSIFICACAO AUTOMACAO', 'AUTO', 1, 'CT#AUTO', 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM classificacaoparceiro WHERE idclassificacaoparceiro = 99999);

INSERT INTO grupoparceiro (idgrupoparceiro, idnativo, descricao, codigoerp, wsversao, sglgrupoparceiro) SELECT 99999, 1, 'GRUPO AUTOMACAO', 'CT#AUTO', 1, 'AUTO' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM grupoparceiro WHERE idgrupoparceiro = 99999);

INSERT INTO tipologia (idtipologia, idnativo, descricao, codigo, sgltipologia, codigoerp, wsversao) SELECT 99999, 1, 'TIPOLOGIA AUTOMACAO', 'AUTO', 'AUT', 'CT#AUTO', 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tipologia WHERE idtipologia = 99999);

INSERT INTO regiao (idregiao, descricao, codigo, idnativo, codigoerp, wsversao) SELECT 99999, 'REGIAO AUTOMACAO', 'AUTO', 1, 'CT#AUTO', 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM regiao WHERE idregiao = 99999);

INSERT INTO segmento (idsegmento, descricao, idnativo, codigo, sigla, idnconsomecotasupervisor, codigoerp, wsversao) SELECT 99999, 'SEGMENTO AUTOMACAO', 1, 'AUTO', 'AUT', 0, 'CT#AUTO', 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM segmento WHERE idsegmento = 99999);
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Configura parametros para testes de CNPJ
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.
kw.msg: ${sql} = UPDATE wsconfigentidadecampo SET idnpermitevisualizar = 1, idnpermiteeditar = 1 WHERE nomecampo IN ('documentoidentificacao', 'pessoajuridica_documentoidentificacao')

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
UPDATE wsconfigentidadecampo SET idnpermitevisualizar = 1, idnpermiteeditar = 1 WHERE nomecampo IN ('documentoidentificacao', 'pessoajuridica_documentoidentificacao')

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Abre navegador
kw.doc: Abre o navegador configurado. Em modo headless (CI/CD), passe --variable HEADLESS:true na linha de comando do robot.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
kw.msg: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 001 ::: Campo aceita letras A-Z nas 12 primeiras posições e aplica máscara
test.doc: CT01: Digitar letras maiúsculas nas posições 1-12 do CNPJ. O campo deve aceitar e aplicar a máscara SS.SSS.SSS/SSSS-NN. Letras devem aparecer formatadas com pontos, barra e traço.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 002 ::: Campo bloqueia letras nas posições dos dígitos verificadores (13-14)
test.doc: CT02: Tentar digitar letras nas duas últimas posições do CNPJ. A lei exige que os DVs sejam estritamente numéricos. O campo deve bloquear qualquer letra nas posições 13 e 14.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 003 ::: Campo bloqueia caracteres especiais em qualquer posição
test.doc: CT03: Tentar digitar @, #, $, %, & no campo CNPJ. O campo não deve aceitar nenhum caractere especial.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 004 ::: Campo converte letras minúsculas para maiúsculas automaticamente
test.doc: CT10: Digitar CNPJ com letras minúsculas (ex: 12abc34501de). A lei especifica A-Z maiúsculas. O campo deve converter automaticamente para maiúsculas ao digitar ou ao sair do campo (blur). Isso evita quebra no cálculo do DV (ASCII 'a'=97 ≠ 'A'=65).
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 005 ::: Campo bloqueia letras acentuadas e caractere Ç
test.doc: CT11: Tentar colar/digitar ã, é, ç, etc. A lei especifica as 26 letras do alfabeto (sem acentos). Acentos desviam do padrão ASCII e devem ser bloqueados.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 006 ::: Campo sanitiza CNPJ colado com espaços extras (trim)
test.doc: CT12: Colar no campo um CNPJ com espaços em branco no início/fim, simulando cópia de PDF ou e-mail. O campo deve fazer trim e aplicar a máscara corretamente, sem jogar os últimos caracteres para fora do limite de 14 posições.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 007 ::: CNPJ alfanumérico válido é aceito e gravado no banco
test.doc: CT04: Gera CNPJ alfanumérico dinamicamente com DVs matematicamente corretos (Módulo 11 / ASCII). Cadastra PJ completo e valida persistência no banco. Atenção: a coluna documentoidentificacao deve ser VARCHAR — se for Integer, o banco estoura Type Mismatch.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 008 ::: CNPJ alfanumérico com DV inválido é rejeitado pelo sistema
test.doc: CT05: Usa base conhecida 12ABC34501DE cujos DVs corretos são 35. Informa DV errado (99) e tenta salvar. O sistema deve barrar e exibir mensagem de erro (ex: "CNPJ Inválido").
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 009 ::: CNPJ alfanumérico zerado é rejeitado (regra RFB)
test.doc: CNPJ composto somente de zeros (00000000000000) é vedado pela RFB. O sistema deve rejeitar sem gravar.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 010 ::: CNPJ alfanumérico com tamanho incorreto é rejeitado
test.doc: CNPJ com 13 caracteres (um a menos que o obrigatório de 14) deve ser rejeitado por formato inválido.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 011 ::: CNPJ alfanumérico com base 100% em letras é aceito
test.doc: CT17: Apesar de improvável no primeiro dia da lei, é matematicamente e legalmente possível um CNPJ com os 12 primeiros caracteres sendo apenas letras (ex: AA.AAA.AAA/AAAA-XX). O sistema não pode presumir que deve haver ao menos um número.

test.name: Teste 012 ::: Pesquisa cliente por CNPJ alfanumérico com máscara
test.doc: CT08: Na listagem de clientes, pesquisar usando CNPJ formatado (ex: 12.ABC.345/01DE-35). O sistema deve retornar o cadastro. Depende de T007 ter criado um cliente com CNPJ alfanumérico.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 013 ::: Pesquisa cliente por CNPJ alfanumérico sem máscara
test.doc: CT09: Na listagem de clientes, pesquisar usando CNPJ sem formatação (ex: 12ABC34501DE35). O sistema deve limpar a formatação internamente e retornar o mesmo cadastro. Depende de T007 ter criado um cliente com CNPJ alfanumérico.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

test.name: Teste 014 ::: CNPJ numérico tradicional continua sendo aceito
test.doc: CT06: A lei é clara — CNPJs numéricos existentes continuam válidos. Valida que a implementação do CNPJ alfanumérico não quebra o fluxo de cadastro com CNPJ numérico no formato NN.NNN.NNN/NNNN-NN. Esta é a principal garantia de não quebrar a base de clientes atual.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.doc: Disconnects from the database.

suite.doc:
Testes de validação do campo CNPJ alfanumérico no cadastro de cliente PJ.
Contexto: A partir da Instrução Normativa RFB nº 2.119/2022, o CNPJ passa a aceitar caracteres alfanuméricos (letras A-Z e dígitos 0-9) nas posições de raiz e ordem (posições 1 a 12). Os 2 dígitos verificadores continuam numéricos, calculados via Módulo 11 com valores ASCII (char - 48).
Formato alfanumérico: SS.SSS.SSS/SSSS-NN (S=letra ou número, N=número) Exemplo válido: 12.ABC.345/01DE-35
CAMADAS TESTADAS: 1. Campo/Máscara — comportamento do input enquanto o usuário digita 2. Regra de negócio — cálculo do Módulo 11 com ASCII 3. Persistência — gravação correta no banco (campo VARCHAR) 4. Pesquisa — listagem de clientes por CNPJ alfanumérico 5. Retrocompatibilidade — CNPJ numérico ainda funciona
⚠️ Pré-requisito: a versão do SFA deve ter o suporte a CNPJ alfanumérico implementado. Testes de comportamento do campo (T002–T005) falharão em versões sem a feature de front-end. T001 e T009 falharão sem back-end.
suite.status: Suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: JavaScript code failed from unknown command: 'Runtime.evaluate' wasn't found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdd29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bafa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b85db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b849802] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b847f2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b84865f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b875a17] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b868615] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8684b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b838017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8360b5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b91cd0f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8dff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b903b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8a9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff73b8aa183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdfde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bdf8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73be19d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb16785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb1facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb03634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bb037e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff73bae7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fffb146e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fffb21cc48c+2c]
